liquidity().details: This is the amount of assetToken that is available to withdraw from aave for asset Tokenand also adds the amount of assetToken held by the Farm contract (not deposited to aave if any)

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

params.to: Address to receive the withdrawn assets

assetToken().notice: the asset used by deposits and withdrawals in the farm

assets().notice: Returns the rebasing balance of the aToken

cap().notice: cap on the amount of assets that can be deposited into the farm

core().notice: address of the Core contract referenced

deposit().notice: deposit all asset() held by the contract into the farm

emergencyAction((address,uint256,bytes)[.notice: due to inflexibility of current smart contracts, add this ability to be able to execute arbitrary calldata against arbitrary addresses. callable only by governor

liquidity().notice: Returns the liquidity available on aave for the assetToken

maxDeposit().notice: Returns the max deposit amount for the underlying protocol

maxSlippage().notice: Max slippage for depositing and witdhrawing assets from the farm.

setCap(uint256).notice: set the deposit cap of the farm

setCore(address).notice: WARNING CALLING THIS FUNCTION CAN POTENTIALLY BRICK A CONTRACT IF CORE IS SET INCORRECTLYset new reference to core only callable by governor

setMaxSlippage(uint256).notice: set the max tolerated slippage for depositing and witdhrawing assets from the farm

withdraw(uint256,address).notice: withdraw an amount of the asset() from the farm
